nodes.label: Minigame Economy Balancing Formula
nodes.rationale: Raw points never convert directly to conchas. Each minigame has an economic profile considering difficulty and natural point volume. Formula: pontosEconomicos = round(pontosBrutos * taxaDoMinigame), with victory bonus, special challenge multiplier, and a hard cap: final conchas ≤ pontosBrutos. Global gain multiplier starts at 0.45x, scales +0.02 per upgrade level, caps at 1.8x.

nodes.label: Minigame Difficulty Criteria (1-5 Scale)
nodes.rationale: Difficulty rated 1-5 considering time pressure, error penalty, motor precision, memory/planning load, variance, and median run points-per-minute. Progression: 1 (risk-free) → 5 (high execution, high variance, constant risk).

nodes.label: Minigame Economic Profiles
nodes.rationale: Six minigames with distinct profiles: Subida (very low volume, difficulty 4, 0.58 rate), Trama (low volume, difficulty 2, 0.38), Lembrancas (medium-high, difficulty 4, 0.32), Banquete (medium-high, difficulty 3, 0.28), Estalo (high volume, difficulty 2, 0.20), Ruptura (very high volume, difficulty 5, 0.09). Adjustment rule: compare conchas/minute, not conchas/run.
